/CAL:BENCH WARRANT - SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT/X:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT ISDISCHARGED WITH NO FINDING OF CONTEMPT/ORNAS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE,THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY//X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:DATE OF 02-02-21 IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL:STATUS OF M99 #20013585/LD:02-16-21 (60TH)/X:ACCORDING TO THE COURTRECORDS, CASE #20013585 HAS BEEN DISMISSED/ORNAS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'SDEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDERIN FILE,/X:ADDITIONALLY DEFENDANT CAN ENGAGE ONLY IN PRE-APPROVED ACTIVITIES SUCH AS MEDICAL AND GOING TO GET GOVERNMENT ASSISTANCE/ /CONTD:PHC/DOP/
